title: hieracium cordatum subsp. heteradenum
intro: Hieracium cordatum subsp. heteradenum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium cordatum subsp. heteradenum are said to include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
